# e_D (Mpc) | Q_D | Inclination i (deg) | e_i (deg).  Full MRT has more
# columns (luminosity, gas mass, etc.) but those are not needed for P3.
#
# Q_D key: 1 = direct (Cepheids/TRGB), 2 = TRGB-quality, 3 = rotation-curve
# direct, 4 = group/cluster membership, 5 = Hubble-flow redshift.
# e_D scales with Q_D: Q=1 typically 5-10%, Q=5 typically 20-25%.
#
